task: Standalone COTS lookup. All required constraints are in this request. Find the best COTS match for an M3 bolt and return the exact part ID, manufacturer, price, weight, source, and why it fits a generic small fastener need.
expected_criteria: Uses catalog search and returns the exact M3_BOLT candidate with concrete price and weight fields.

task: Standalone COTS lookup. All required constraints are in this request. Find an M3 bolt candidate with max_cost <= 0.50 USD and return the exact part ID, price, weight, source, and why it satisfies the budget edge.
expected_criteria: Uses catalog search with an explicit cost filter and still returns the exact M3_BOLT match.

task: Standalone COTS lookup. All required constraints are in this request. Search for an M3 bolt candidate with max_cost <= 0.49 USD and max_weight_g <= 1.10. If no candidate exists, say so explicitly and explain which constraints reject the available part.
expected_criteria: Handles constrained fail-closed behavior by explicitly reporting no valid match and naming the rejecting constraints.
